notes: SDK is downloaded by build.sh on first run (~200 MB); not present in CI runner
Integration tests need -pack first (consumes packed NuGets from artifacts/packages/)
launchSettings.json has a JSON parsing quirk that causes a warning but does not affect test execution
System dotnet (8.0/9.0/10.0) available at /usr/share/dotnet/ for syntax verification in isolated projects
